queries.question: Which architect designed LAX?
queries.sql:
SELECT architecture_firm FROM Buildings
JOIN Terminals ON Buildings.airport_terminal = Terminals.terminal_name
JOIN Airports ON Terminals.airport_id = Airports.id
WHERE Airports.name LIKE "%LAX%"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?architecture_firm WHERE {
  ?buildings a :Buildings .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?buildings p:airport_terminal ?airport_terminal_l .
  ?terminals p:terminal_name ?terminal_name_r .
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?terminals p:hasAirports ?airports .
  ?buildings p:architecture_firm ?architecture_firm .
  ?airports p:name ?name_lk .
  FILTER(STR(?airport_terminal_l) = STR(?terminal_name_r))
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?name_lk), "^.*LAX.*$"))
}

queries.question: Tell me the architect who did the building design of the airport in Paris.
queries.sql:
SELECT architect FROM Buildings
JOIN Terminals ON Buildings.airport_terminal = Terminals.terminal_name
JOIN Airports ON Terminals.airport_id = Airports.id
WHERE Airports.location LIKE "%Paris%"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?architect WHERE {
  ?buildings a :Buildings .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?buildings p:airport_terminal ?airport_terminal_l .
  ?terminals p:terminal_name ?terminal_name_r .
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?terminals p:hasAirports ?airports .
  ?buildings p:architect ?architect .
  ?airports p:location ?location_lk .
  FILTER(STR(?airport_terminal_l) = STR(?terminal_name_r))
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?location_lk), "^.*Paris.*$"))
}
